info.description: Persistent shared memory infrastructure for AI agents. Stores observations in PostgreSQL + pgvector, exposes MCP tools via HTTP/SSE.
info.title: Engram API

post.description: Returns aggregated analytics for search queries that returned zero results, useful for self-tuning.
Stores pre-extracted observations from a backfill run. Supports semantic deduplication via vector similarity.
Accepts raw JSONL session content, runs server-side LLM extraction, and stores resulting observations with semantic deduplication.

503.description: LLM not configured or store not initialized

get.description: Returns status of all active backfill runs including stored/skipped/error counts per run.
Returns the count of observations for a project (cached).
Returns observations relevant to specific files being worked on, using vector similarity search.

post.description: Returns context for injection at session start. Response includes recent (last 5), relevant (top 10 semantic), and guidance sections. Supports GET (deprecated) and POST. Critical startup path — optimized for speed.

parameters.description: Agent ID (acts as project scope if project empty)
parameters.name: agent_id

get.description: Searches observations relevant to a user prompt using hybrid vector + FTS search with query expansion, cross-encoder reranking, and clustering. Supports both GET (query params) and POST (JSON body) to avoid URL length limits.

parameters.description: Agent ID (acts as project scope if project empty)
parameters.name: agent_id

post.description: Searches observations using decision-optimized semantic search. Thin REST wrapper over the search manager's Decisions method.
Receives raw tool events from Claude Code hooks. Stores in raw_events, runs deterministic Level 0 pipeline, creates an observation, and triggers async embedding.

get.description: Returns graph statistics for the dashboard, using relation data to compute knowledge graph metrics.

post.description: Triggers a manual re-sync of relations from PostgreSQL to FalkorDB. Runs in background.

get.description: Returns 200 OK immediately (even during init) so hooks can connect quickly. Use /api/ready for full readiness check.

post.description: Imports instinct files from a directory on the server. Validates path against allowed base directory.

get.description: Returns log entries as JSON snapshot or SSE stream (follow mode). Supports level filtering and text search.

parameters.description: Minimum log level: trace, debug, info, warn, error, fatal
parameters.name: level

parameters.description: If true, switches to SSE streaming mode
parameters.name: follow

get.description: Returns available embedding models with default and current model info. Cacheable for 1 hour.
Returns recent observations with optional semantic search via vector store. Supports pagination.
Returns archival statistics including counts and trends.

post.description: Archives observations by ID list or by age criteria. Supports batch archival with parallel processing and per-observation error tracking.

parameters.description: Archive criteria: ids, project, max_age_days, reason
parameters.name: body

get.description: Returns archived observations, optionally filtered by project.

post.description: Imports multiple observations in a single request. Supports deduplication within the batch. Max batch size: 100.
Updates status for multiple observations in one request. Actions: supersede, archive, set_feedback. Max 500 IDs.

get.description: Finds potential duplicate observations using Jaccard similarity clustering. Returns groups of similar observations.
Exports observations in JSON or CSV format. Supports filtering by project, scope, and type. Returns file as download attachment.

parameters.description: Export format: json or csv (default json)
parameters.name: format

post.description: Records that observations were injected into Claude Code context by incrementing injection counts.

get.description: Returns the most frequently retrieved observations by retrieval count.
Returns observations that have been recently injected into Claude Code context.
Returns the highest-scoring observations by importance score.
Returns a single observation by its ID.

put.description: Updates an existing observation's fields. Only provided fields are updated.

post.description: Records user feedback (thumbs up/down) for an observation and recalculates its importance score.

get.description: Returns the relation graph for an observation up to the specified depth.
Returns observations related to a given one, filtered by minimum confidence.
Returns all relations for a specific observation with full details.
Returns a breakdown of how an observation's importance score was calculated, including all scoring components.

post.description: Restores an archived observation to active status.
Records a utility signal (used, corrected, ignored) for an observation, updating its utility score via EMA.

get.description: Returns all active patterns, optionally filtered by type or project.
Returns a pattern by its unique name.

post.description: Merges a source pattern into a target pattern. Source pattern is consumed.

get.description: Performs full-text search on patterns.
Returns aggregate statistics about patterns including counts by type and status.
Returns a single pattern by its ID.

delete.description: Deletes a pattern by its ID.

post.description: Marks a pattern as deprecated.

get.description: Returns a formatted insight string for a pattern, generated by the pattern detector.
Returns all known projects. Response is cacheable for 5 minutes.
Returns recent user prompts with optional semantic search via vector store.
Returns 200 only when fully initialized, 503 otherwise.
Returns the current status of vector rebuild operations, providing visibility into long-running rebuild operations.
Returns statistics about relations including total count, high confidence count, and breakdown by type.
Returns all relations of a specific type (e.g., supersedes, contradicts, extends).

post.description: Restarts the worker process (general restart, not tied to update).

get.description: Returns all concept weights used in scoring calculations.

put.description: Updates the weight for a specific concept used in scoring calculations.

post.description: Triggers an immediate background recalculation of all observation importance scores.

get.description: Returns scoring statistics including feedback distribution and recalculator stats.
Returns comprehensive search analytics including vector search rate, zero result rate, top keywords, and query type distribution.
Returns recent search queries for analytics purposes.
Returns the health status of all system components (PostgreSQL, Vector DB, SDK Processor, SSE, Reranker).
Looks up a session by its Claude session ID.
get.summary: Get session by Claude session ID

post.description: Returns which session IDs from the request are NOT yet indexed.
Accepts a raw JSONL session transcript and indexes it. Supports gzip-compressed bodies.
Handles session initialization from user-prompt hook. Idempotent — duplicate requests within a short time window return existing prompt data.
Handles observation posting from post-tool-use hook. Creates session on-the-fly if not found.
Handles subagent/Task completion notifications. Triggers immediate processing of any queued observations from the subagent.
Runs LLM-based extraction of behavioral patterns from a session transcript and stores resulting guidance observations.

get.description: Returns observations that were injected into a specific session's context.

post.description: Records which observations were injected into a specific session. Dual-writes to per-session table and global injection_count counter.

get.description: Returns comprehensive worker statistics including uptime, memory, database health, vector cache, graph, and rate limiter stats.
Returns detailed retrieval statistics including hit rates and latency.
Returns recent session summaries with optional semantic search via vector store.
Returns the latest similarity telemetry data. Optionally filter by project to get a single snapshot.
Returns the canonical list of observation and concept types. Cacheable for 24 hours.

post.description: Downloads and applies an available update in the background.

get.description: Checks for available updates from the release server. Returns current version and availability info. Handles rate limiting gracefully.

post.description: Restarts the worker with the new binary after an update has been applied. Requires update state to be 'done'.

get.description: Returns the current update status (idle, downloading, done, error).
Returns vector database metrics for the dashboard including queries, latency, storage, and cache stats. Returns enabled: false if vector features are not available.
Returns comprehensive health information about the vector database including health score, warnings, cache hit rate, and rebuild status.

post.description: Rebuilds all vectors from observations, summaries, and prompts. Returns 409 if already in progress, 429 if called too frequently (5 min cooldown).

get.description: Returns the worker version string for version checking.

post.description: Initializes an SDK agent session in the session manager. Observations are processed asynchronously.
Handles summarize requests from the stop hook. Queues a summarization request for background processing.

get.description: Returns available embedding models in OpenAI-compatible format. Compatible with LiteLLM proxy model listing.

observations.description: Observations are the extracted observations to store.

project.description: Project is the project path from session metadata.

run_id.description: RunID groups observations from the same backfill run (for rollback).

session_id.description: SessionID is a unique identifier for the source session (e.g. filename hash).

content.description: Content is the raw JSONL session data.

project.description: Project overrides the project path from session metadata. Empty = use parsed value.

run_id.description: RunID groups observations from the same backfill run.

session_id.description: SessionID identifies the source session (e.g. UUID from filename).

valid.description: Valid is true if Int64 is not NULL
Valid is true if String is not NULL
